api_endpoints.explained: Lấy danh sách máy Android đang kết nối
Bắt đầu stream log từ ADB cho device cụ thể
Dừng tiến trình ADB logcat đang chạy
Hiển thị Save Dialog và lưu log ra file .txt

features: Load project settings and validate build.gradle
Install APK via ADB to connected devices
Real-time log streaming from Gradle/ADB to UI
Premium Minimalist Apple-style Dark Blue UI
Open APK Folder directly from UI (Cross-platform)
Branding: Custom Footer & Go Version display
Logcat Filter by Level (V, D, I, W, E, F)
Virtual Scrolling (react-window) for high-performance log display

patterns: Event-based log streaming via Wails EventsEmit
Minimalist Apple-style design system with Dark Blue palette
Regex-based pattern matching for 'adb logcat -v threadtime' output
UI virtualization for high-frequency data updates (Logcat)
Auto-scroll override pattern: Pause auto-scroll when user scrolls upward
gotchas: Wails requires Go 1.22+ and explicit binding generation
Tailwind CSS in Wails/Vite needs .cjs config for ESM projects
XDG-Open is required for Linux folder opening
CSS @import must be at the very top of style.css
ADB and SDK paths on Linux are not always inherited by GUI apps; required manual scanning of common paths (~/Android/Sdk, /usr/lib/android-sdk, etc.)
exec.LookPath is used as a fallback for 'adb' system-wide availability
Wails bindings (wailsjs/) are not version-controlled; frontend imports need // @ts-ignore before build
Logcat scrolling: react-window requires FixedSizeList for extreme performance with >10k lines
JS Memory management: Logcat buffer capped at 50k lines locally to prevent V8 heap crashes
react-window ESM compatibility: Downgrade to v1 if v2 causes build errors in Vite/Wails
Browser default combobox styling: Use explicit bg-white text-black for highest contrast in dark themes
conventions: Glassmorphism UI utility classes in style.css
Environment Detection: Always check ANDROID_HOME environment variable and multiple OS-specific default paths
Fixed row height (24px) for virtualized log lists to ensure perfect grid alignment
